title: The Delhi Motor Vehicles Taxation Act, 1962
full_text: The Delhi Motor Vehicles Taxation Act, 1962 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196257 Act Number: 57 Enactment Date: 1962-12-15 Act Year: 1962 Short Title: The Delhi Motor Vehicles Taxation Act, 1962 Long Title: An Act to impose a tax on motor vehicles in the Union territory of Delhi and for other matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Road Transport and Highways Enforcement Date: 01-04-1963 Notification: 1st April, 1963, vide notification No. G.S.R. 1254 (E), dated 18th September, 1962, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3 (i). Schedule 1. SCHEDULE I Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. SCHEDULE II Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Delhi Motor Vehicles Taxation Act, 1962 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Levy of tax. Section 4. Declaration and payment of tax. Section 5. Issue of token. Section 6. Additional declaration. Section 7. Liability for additional tax. Section 8. Production of certificate of insurance. Section 9. Liability to pay arrears of tax of person succeeding to the ownership, possession or control of motor vehicles. Section 10. Refund of tax. Section 11. Penalty payable when tax not paid. Section 12. Arrears of tax and penalty recoverable as arrears of land revenue. Section 13. Exemptions. Section 14. Reduction of tax in cases of certain motor vehicles. Section 15. Effect of payment of tax in other States with respect to motor vehicles brought into Delhi. Section 16. Appeal. Section 17. Powers of police officers and other officers. Section 18. Penalty for incomplete and untrue declaration, etc. Section 19. Other penalties. Section 20. Utilization of the proceeds of tax. Section 21. Trial of offences. Section 22. Protection for bona fide acts. Section 23. Power to make rules. Section 24. Repeal. Section 25. Amendment of section 184, Act 66 of 1957. Schedule 1. SCHEDULE I Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2.
